rulings.Case Title: EDWARD HICKS et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Union Carbide Corporation Compelling Compliance
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, April 7, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. DEFENDANT UNION CARBIDE CORPORATION's Motion Of Defendant Union Carbide Corporation Compelling Compliance is off calendar per request of moving party. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: KEITH SIMMONS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Protective Order Re Deposition Of David Lucchetti And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Wednesday, April 7, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Pacific Coast Building Products, Inc.¿s motion for protective order re deposition of David Lucchetti and request for monetary sanctions, If the parties have not fully resolved all issues raised by the motion before then, by 4:30 p.m. today they must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, the issues that remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing. = (220/HEK)
